tasks.label: Backup to Google Drive
tasks.detail: Stage all, commit, and push — triggers the backup workflows automatically
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m '${input:commitMessage}'; git push

tasks.label: Restore from Google Drive
tasks.detail: Triggers workflow, waits for it to complete, then auto pulls
tasks.command: gh workflow run pull-from-gdrive.yml --ref main --field confirm=YES; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; gh run watch; git pull
